Our Advantage

Why RiskMantra Advisors?

Big firms send juniors. We deliver senior expertise directly — no bureaucracy, no generic templates.

🎯

Direct Founder Access

Every engagement is led by ex-CROs and Risk Leaders who have personally built these systems. No delegation to juniors.

⚡

Agility & Responsiveness

No bureaucracy, no legacy conflicts, no resource bottlenecks. You get immediate attention and fast execution.

🔬

Deep Specialization

We focus ONLY on risk. Unmatched depth across Market, Credit, Liquidity, Operational and Enterprise Risk.

🏛️

Diverse Institutional DNA

From SBI to UBS, Barclays to SFBs — we tailor advice to your institution's size, culture, and complexity.

💻

Techno-Functional Bridge

Deep expertise in Calypso, Murex, SAS, FM Converge. We speak both risk domain and technology fluently.

📋

Regulatory Readiness

Direct experience navigating RBI inspections and supervisory reviews. We prepare you, not just advise you.

Methodology

Four Strategic Pillars

Our foundational advisory methodology covering the full risk transformation journey.

01
TRANSFORM

Risk transformation journey including governance, policies, risk appetite, risk intelligence, committees, and risk culture.

02
BUILD

Risk frameworks, models, systems, analytics, automated reporting, dashboards, valuation engines, and assessment tools.

03
VALIDATE

Independent review, model validation, regulatory readiness, supervisory preparedness and compliance assurance.

04
EDUCATE

Board workshops, senior leadership trainings, risk capability development, and immersive practical case-led learning.

Offerings

Our Service Portfolio

Comprehensive risk advisory spanning every domain — from governance to technology, analytics to training.

📊

Market Risk Advisory

  • VaR, Expected Shortfall & Back-testing
  • Governance & Risk Policy Frameworks
  • Regulatory reviews & Mock AFI health checks
  • System selection & UAT oversight
  • Capital charge computation & stress testing
💧

ALM & Liquidity Risk

  • LCR / NSFR optimization
  • Dynamic IRRBB: NII & EVE sensitivity
  • Behavioral modelling for non-maturity products
  • FTP Framework design
  • Intraday liquidity monitoring
💳

Credit Risk Analytics

  • Credit Rating & Scoring models
  • Integrated Early Warning Signal (EWS) framework
  • ECL computations under Ind-AS
  • RAROC / Risk-adjusted profitability
  • Delinquency & predictive default modeling
⚙️

Operational Risk

  • ORM, BCP & Outsourcing governance
  • RCSA workshops & process mapping
  • KRI Framework (RAG thresholds)
  • Capital charge (BIA / TSA)
  • Pre-RBI inspection readiness
💻

System Advisory

  • Calypso, Murex, SAS, FM Converge implementation
  • Market data integration (Bloomberg, Reuters)
  • Risk data warehouse design
  • Behavioral model development
  • Vendor negotiation & selection
🎓

Training & Knowledge

  • Board & senior leadership workshops
  • Bond mathematics & derivatives
  • Hedge effectiveness & accounting
  • ECL, CVA & liquidity risk basics
  • Customized programs per institution
Clients

Who We Serve

Tailored solutions for every type of financial institution and corporate treasury.

🏦

Banks & SFBs

  • SA-CCR / ICAAP / ILAAP / IRRBB
  • Basel III Compliance
  • Treasury & Risk System implementation
  • ECL for Ind-AS
  • AD-1 Setup & Regulatory Health Checks
  • Enterprise Risk Frameworks & Policies
  • VaR, Stress Testing & Capital models
💰

NBFCs & HFCs

  • Funding strategy optimization
  • Liquidity Standards (LCR/NSFR)
  • ECL for Ind-AS
  • Risk indicators covering all material risks
  • Scale-Based Regulations
  • Operational risk governance
  • Credit scoring & underwriting models
🏢

Corporates & SMEs

  • Virtual Treasurer & Risk Office
  • FX hedging policy & strategies
  • Fair Value Checks on derivatives
  • Treasury Policy design & review
  • Hedge accounting & documentation
  • Interest rate risk management
  • Bank rate negotiation support
Outcomes

The Value We Deliver

Measurable, lasting impact across compliance, efficiency, and strategic decision-making.

Regulatory Compliance

Clean supervisory reviews. Board confidence. No major audit findings.

Operational Efficiency

Automation and reduced manual interventions. Sharp reduction in reporting timelines.

Risk Reduction

Better limit enforcement, reduced unauthorized trades, lower operational losses.

Capital Optimization

Smarter balance sheet strategy. Improved NIM and ROA through risk-adjusted thinking.

Capability Building

Team skill elevation. Risk culture transformation. Sustainable long-term improvement.

Strategic Clarity

Board confidence in risk appetite and strategic execution. Decisive, defensible decisions.

Approach

Our Engagement Model

A structured, phased approach from initial diagnostic to long-term partnership.

1
Diagnostic
Initial Deep Dive

Health check of current risk posture and gap identification to set the project baseline.

2
Blueprint
Strategic Roadmap

Policy drafting and system selection guidance for long-term scalability and efficiency.

3
Execution
Implementation Phase

System UAT, comprehensive training, and Go-Live support to minimize operational friction.

4
Retainer
Ongoing Advisory

Monthly ALCO support, quarterly reviews, and continuous improvement of risk maturity.
